sqlMap.select:
SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) STARTDATE, WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))

SELECT TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, CASE WHEN (TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ = '' OR TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME ELSE TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERNAME, CASE WHEN (TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE ELSE TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ END APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME ELSE TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(TBL_APRLINEINFO.RECEIVEDDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) RECEIVEDDATE, CASE WHEN (TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ = '' OR TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME ELSE TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERNAME, CASE WHEN (TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE ELSE TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ END PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME ELSE TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERDEPTNAME FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE ON TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.APRMEMBERSN AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
